entry.title: the faust paradox
entry.summary:
Author: albertacanuck

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,827Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 47

Summary: a magic trap requires a confession of a buried truth to open. unfortunately for jason and dick, they’re trapped together, and the universe doesn't care about their secrets until they finally start telling the truth. or: a veritas spell breaks jason's walls down, and dick isn't letting him run away this time.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,147Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 620

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: To Love One Another Like the Sun and Moon
entry.summary:
Author: bluewingsofthenight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,088Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 36

Summary: “I would have never left you.”To this, Dick pulls back, a brief flash of pain mars his features, before settling to something softer.“I know you would never. You could never.”Smiling softly, he brings a hand to Jason’s cheek.“You came back.” Or: Jason may have left the palace, no longer a Knight, but he will always find his way back to Dick, to his Prince. For Day 4: Red Strings of Fate AU - Forbidden Love

entry.title: bad believer
entry.summary:
Author: aikane

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,444Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

Summary: Everyone in Gotham, it seems, is familiar with the story of Richard Wayne: the playboy billionaire's ward turned strip-club headliner. The details are murky, as they always are, but the facts of the matter are that one day Richard was living the good life under the protective eye of his adoptive father Bruce Wayne, and the next he was spotted on the stage of the seedy downtown nightclub "Titans". It doesn't explain what he's doing in Jason's church, however.

entry.title: The Dynamic Duo
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,001Chapters: 6/34Kudos: 232

Summary: Having been Batman for four years, Dick Grayson still hasn't gotten used to the cowl. Now, investigating a mass disappearance case, Dick meets a young street rat who's had friends tangled up in the same web. Jason Todd has all the traits Dick saw in himself when he first started—curious, shrewd, agile, and, most importantly, wanting to do good. Despite Dick's initial rejection of the boy, he starts to think that a long-term partnership isn't a bad idea. Perhaps four years have been long enough time for the current stasis. Perhaps, he thinks, it's time for his own Robin.

entry.title: Afterglow
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,744Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: On the eve of a Wayne family wedding, the family celebrates love, friendship, and happily-ever-afters. While Tim and Damian prepare to begin their forever, old desires and old wounds resurface for Jason and Dick, forcing them to reexamine a love story they thought had ended years ago.

entry.title: The Stray
entry.summary:
Author: Rustycrunch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,098Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Gotham does not forgive, and it does not forget. Neither does Samira Jimenez, local graduate student and local wannabe vigilante. When her father, a district attorney who dared to believe in a reformed city, is murdered, Samira is left with nothing but grief, a coin she cannot place, and a dangerous name whispered between criminals in the dark: Red Hood. Trained in the shadows by a cat-loving mentor who showed her what Gotham was really made of, Samira learned that trust often came with a cost. Her pain had no room in these dark streets. And finding out the truth of her father's murder could lead her down a path that she'd spent her life fighting against. But Gotham's truths are never simple, and the man she has been hunting is not the killer she imagined. In a city where every light casts a longer shadow, Samira must decide what justice really means and how much of herself she is willing to lose to find it.

entry.summary:
Author: mynameisjessejk

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 134

Summary: This was not exactly what Bruce wanted when he suggested a Malone collaboration to prevent the Two-Facers from blowing up the entire leadership of the Irish Mob, but he probably should've expected it once Jason and Dick got involved.
